            /* Vertical por defecto (celular) */
            align-items: center;

            flex: 1;

            /* Espacio entre logo y nombre */
        }

        }

        .team--away {
            text-align: center;
        }

            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            object-fit: contain;

        .match-card__score {

            color: #6c757d;
        }

        .match-card__score.en-juego {
            color: #dc3545;
        }

        .match-card__score.finalizado {
            color: var(--dimayor-accent, #023171);
        }

        .live-badge {
            background-color: #dc3545;
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 9px;
            font-weight: 800;
            padding: 2px 6px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
            display: inline-block;
            animation: dimayor-pulse 1.5s infinite;
        }

        @keyframes dimayor-pulse {
            0% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: 0.5; }
            100% { opacity: 1; }
        }

        .match-action-btn {
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 600;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #dfe3e8;
            background: #f8f9fa;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin-top: 8px;
        }

        .match-card__footer {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 20px;
            background: #f8f9fa;
            border-top: 1px solid #e9ecef;
            padding: 8px 15px;
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #6c757d;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .match-card__detail {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            min-width: 0;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .match-card__detail svg {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            stroke: #adb5bd;
        }

        /* Antes: max-height: 20px; */
        .match-card__detail.channel-logo img {
            height: 40px;
            width: auto;
            object-fit: contain;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }

        /* Por si algún contenedor estuviera forzando cortes */
        .match-card__detail.channel-logo {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            min-width: 0;
            gap: 6px;
        }


        /* Estilos de la tabla de posiciones (sin cambios) */
        .dimayor-table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            font-size: 14px;
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, .08)
        }

        .dimayor-table th,
        .dimayor-table td {
            padding: 12px 15px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
            text-align: center;
            vertical-align: middle
        }

        .dimayor-table thead th {
            background: var(--dimayor-accent, #f8f9fa);
            color: #fff;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-size: 12px
        }

        .dimayor-table .team-name-cell {
            text-align: left !important;
            font-weight: 600
        }

        .dimayor-table .team-logo {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            vertical-align: middle;
            margin-right: 8px
        }


        @media (min-width:768px) {
            .dimayor-inner-nav {
                flex-direction: row;
                align-items: center;
                padding: 10px 15px;
                justify-content: space-between;
            }

            .content-loader-container {
                padding: 20px
            }

            .team {
                flex-direction: row;
                /* Horizontal en PC */
                gap: 0;
            }

            .team--home {
                flex-direction: row;
                justify-content: flex-end;
                text-align: right;
            }

            .team--away {
                flex-direction: row;
                justify-content: flex-start;
                text-align: left;
            }

            .team__name {
                font-size: 18px;
                margin: 0 12px;
                white-space: nowrap;
                text-align: inherit;
            }
        }

        /* Estilos del Modal (sin cambios) */
        .dimayor-modal-container {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 9990
        }

        .dimayor-modal-backdrop {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, .45);
            z-index: 9998;
        }

        .dimayor-modal {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 10% 50% auto 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, 0);
            width: min(960px, 92vw);
            max-height: 80vh;
            overflow-y: auto;
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 14px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, .25);
            z-index: 9999;
        }

        .dimayor-modal[aria-hidden="true"] {
            display: none;
        }

        .dimayor-modal header {
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            background: var(--dimayor-accent, #111);
            color: #fff;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #eceff2;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .dimayor-modal header h3 {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 800;
        }

        .dimayor-modal .modal-close {
            margin-left: auto;
            border: none;
            background: transparent;
            font-size: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: #fff;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }

        .dimayor-modal .modal-body {
            padding: 14px 16px 18px;
        }

        .dimayor-tabs {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 10px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
        }

        .dimayor-tab {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 14px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all .2s ease;
        }

        .dimayor-tab.is-active {
            border-color: #e9ecef;
            background: #f8f9fa;
            border-radius: 8px;
            color: var(--dimayor-accent, #000);
        }

        .dimayor-tabs__panels {
            margin-top: 16px;
            min-height: 200px;
        }

        .dimayor-tabpanel {
            display: none;
        }

        .dimayor-tabpanel.is-active {
            display: block;
        }

        /* --- ESTILOS DEFINITIVOS PARA TIMELINE CON CSS GRID --- */
        .dim-timeline-grid {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 15px;
            padding: 20px 0;
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .timeline-grid-event {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
            /* Columna Izquierda | Marcador | Columna Derecha */
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }

        .event-timeline-marker {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            width: 50px;
            /* Ancho de la línea de tiempo central */
        }

        .event-timeline-marker::before {
            /* La línea vertical de la timeline */
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 3px;
            background-color: #e9ecef;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .event-icon {
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 50%;
            z-index: 2;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border: 2px solid #eee;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        }

        .event-icon svg {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            display: block;
        }

        .event-minute {
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #6c757d;
            z-index: 2;
            background: #fff;
            padding: 0 5px;
        }

        .event-content--home {
            text-align: right;
        }

        .event-content--away {
            text-align: left;
        }

        .event-body {
            padding: 10px 15px;
            background-color: #f8f9fa;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid #e9ecef;
        }

        .event-title {
            font-weight: 800;
            font-size: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 2px;
        }

        .event-desc {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #333;
            line-height: 1.4;
        }

        /* Colores de eventos */
        .event-type-goal .event-icon {
            border-color: #4caf50;
        }

        .event-type-yellow .event-icon,
        .event-type-second_yellow .event-icon {
            border-color: #ffc107;
        }

        .event-type-red .event-icon {
            border-color: #f44336;
        }

        .event-type-substitution .event-icon {
            border-color: #2196f3;
        }

        /* --- NUEVOS ESTILOS PARA LA PESTAÑA DE NÓMINAS --- */
        .lineups-container {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 30px;
            align-items: flex-start;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .lineup-column {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 0;
        }

        .lineup-column h4 {
            margin-top: 0;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-size: 18px;
            color: var(--dimayor-accent, #023171);
        }

        .lineup-section {
            margin-bottom: 25px;
        }

        .lineup-section h5 {
            margin-top: 0;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 16px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
            padding-bottom: 5px;
        }

        .lineup-table {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .lineup-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 30px 1fr auto;
            /* Número | Nombre | Eventos */
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 8px 6px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f3f5;
        }

        .lineup-shirt-number {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #6c757d;
            text-align: right;
        }

        .lineup-player-name {
            font-weight: 500;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
        }

        .lineup-player-events {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .lineup-event-icon {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 14px;
            height: 16px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }

        .lineup-event-icon.yellow-card,
        .lineup-event-icon.red-card {
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        .lineup-event-icon.sub-off,
        .lineup-event-icon.sub-on {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
            background-color: transparent;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 14px;
            line-height: 1;
        }

        /* Verde para entrar */

        .coach-section {
            margin-top: 20px;
            padding-top: 15px;
            border-top: 1px dashed #ced4da;
        }

        .coach-section h6 {
            margin: 0 0 5px;
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #6c757d;
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        .coach-section p {
            margin: 0;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        /* === Mejora responsive tabla de posiciones (Opción B) === */
        @media (min-width:520px) and (max-width:900px) {
            .dmr-standings {
                overflow-x: auto;
                -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            }

            .dmr-standings table {
                min-width: 720px;
            }

            .dmr-standings th:first-child,
            .dmr-standings td:first-child {
                position: sticky;
                left: 0;
                background: #fff;
                z-index: 2;
            }

            .dmr-standings thead th {
                position: sticky;
                top: 0;
                z-index: 3;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width:519px) {
            .dmr-standings {
                overflow-x: auto;
                -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            }

            .dmr-standings table {
                min-width: 600px;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width:900px) {

            .dmr-standings thead th,
            .dmr-standings tbody td {
                padding: 10px 12px;
            }
        }

        .match-postponed-label {
            font-size: 14px;
            /* Tamaño de fuente más pequeño */
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #e65100;
            /* Un color naranja para indicar estado especial */
            background-color: #fff7f0;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #ffcc99;
        }

        /* --- INICIO DE NUEVOS ESTILOS PARA TABLAS RESPONSIVAS --- */
        .dmr-table-wrapper {
            overflow-x: auto;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            /* Scroll suave en iOS */
        }

        .dmr-table-wrapper .dimayor-table {
            border-spacing: 0;
            /* Necesario para que 'sticky' funcione bien */
        }

        .dmr-table-wrapper thead th {
            position: -webkit-sticky;
            /* Para compatibilidad con Safari */
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 2;
            /* Por encima de las celdas de la primera columna */
        }

        .dmr-table-wrapper tbody th,
        .dmr-table-wrapper tbody td:first-child {
            position: -webkit-sticky;
            position: sticky;
            left: 0;
            background: #fff;
            /* Fondo para ocultar el contenido que pasa por detrás */
            z-index: 1;
        }

        /* Estilo para la celda de la esquina superior izquierda */
        .dmr-table-wrapper thead th:first-child {
            z-index: 3;
        }

        /* Opcional: añadir una pequeña sombra para indicar que hay más contenido */
        .dmr-table-wrapper tbody td:first-child,
        .dmr-table-wrapper thead th:first-child {
            border-right: 1px solid #dee2e6;
        }

        /* --- FIN DE NUEVOS ESTILOS --- */

        /* === Fin mejora responsive === */

    <script>
        (function () {
            // Solo registrar el código base una vez
            if (window.dimayorWidgetInitialized) {
                // Si ya está inicializado, solo ejecutamos la carga inteligente para los nuevos wrappers
                if (typeof runSmartLoad === 'function') {
                    document.querySelectorAll('.dimayor-main-tab-content.active .dimayor-inner-wrapper').forEach(w => runSmartLoad(w));
                }
                return;
            }
            window.dimayorWidgetInitialized = true;

            const ajax_url = "https://dimayor.com.co/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php";
            const nonce = "c2622c1a04";

            // Delegación de eventos para clics
            document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                const tabLink = e.target.closest('.dimayor-main-tab-link');
                if (tabLink) {
                    switchMainTab(tabLink);
                    return;
                }

                const innerTabLink = e.target.closest('.dimayor-inner-tab-link');
                if (innerTabLink) {
                    const wrapper = innerTabLink.closest('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                    if (innerTabLink.classList.contains('active')) return;
                    wrapper.querySelectorAll('.dimayor-inner-tab-link').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
                    innerTabLink.classList.add('active');
                    updateContent(wrapper);
                    return;
                }

                const filterToggle = e.target.closest('.filters-toggle-button');
                if (filterToggle) {
                    const nav = filterToggle.closest('.dimayor-inner-nav');
                    if (nav) nav.classList.toggle('filters-open');
                    return;
                }
            });

            // Delegación de eventos para cambios en filtros
            document.addEventListener('change', function (e) {
                const wrapper = e.target.closest('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                if (!wrapper) return;

                if (e.target.classList.contains('season-filter')) {
                    updateCompetitions(e.target);
                } else if (e.target.classList.contains('competition-filter')) {
                    updatePhases(e.target);
                } else if (e.target.classList.contains('phase-filter')) {
                    updateMatchdays(e.target);
                    updateContent(wrapper);
                } else if (e.target.classList.contains('matchday-filter')) {
                    updateContent(wrapper);
                }
            });

            window.runSmartLoad = async function (wrapper) {
                if (!wrapper || wrapper.dataset.initialized) return;
                wrapper.dataset.initialized = 'true';

                const seasonFilter = wrapper.querySelector('.season-filter');
                const competitionFilter = wrapper.querySelector('.competition-filter');
                const contentLoader = wrapper.querySelector('.content-loader-container');

                contentLoader.innerHTML = '<p>Detectando competición activa...</p>';

                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('action', 'get_active_filters');
                formData.append('nonce', nonce);
                formData.append('season_id', seasonFilter.value);
                formData.append('competition_type', wrapper.dataset.competitionTypeName);

                try {
                    const response = await fetch(ajax_url, { method: 'POST', body: formData });
                    const smartData = await response.json();

                    if (smartData.success) {
                        const { competition_id, phase_id, matchday } = smartData.data;
                        await updateCompetitions(seasonFilter, competition_id);
                        await updatePhases(competitionFilter, phase_id, matchday);
                    } else {
                        updateCompetitions(seasonFilter);
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error("Error durante la carga inteligente:", error);
                    updateCompetitions(seasonFilter);
                }
            };

            function switchMainTab(tab) {
                if (tab.classList.contains('active')) return;
                const container = tab.closest('.dimayor-plugin-wrapper');
                container.querySelectorAll('.dimayor-main-tab-link, .dimayor-main-tab-content').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
                tab.classList.add('active');

                const color = tab.dataset.color || '#023171';
                document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--dimayor-accent', color);

                const content = container.querySelector(`.dimayor-main-tab-content[data-content-type="${tab.dataset.tabType}"]`);
                if (content) {
                    content.classList.add('active');
                    const wrapper = content.querySelector('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                    runSmartLoad(wrapper);
                }
            }

            async function updateCompetitions(seasonSelect, preselectCompetitionId = null) {
                const wrapper = seasonSelect.closest('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                const competitionFilter = wrapper.querySelector('.competition-filter');
                const contentLoader = wrapper.querySelector('.content-loader-container');

                competitionFilter.innerHTML = '<option>Cargando...</option>';
                competitionFilter.disabled = true;
                if (!preselectCompetitionId) contentLoader.innerHTML = '<p>Cargando competiciones...</p>';

                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('action', 'get_competitions_for_season_ajax_v5');
                formData.append('nonce', nonce);
                formData.append('season_id', seasonSelect.value);
                formData.append('competition_type', wrapper.dataset.competitionTypeName);

                const response = await fetch(ajax_url, { method: 'POST', body: formData });
                const data = await response.json();

                competitionFilter.innerHTML = '';
                if (data.success && data.data.length > 0) {
                    data.data.forEach(comp => {
                        competitionFilter.innerHTML += `<option value="${comp.id}">${comp.name}</option>`;
                    });
                    competitionFilter.disabled = false;
                    competitionFilter.style.display = data.data.length > 1 ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                    if (preselectCompetitionId) competitionFilter.value = preselectCompetitionId;
                    if (!preselectCompetitionId) await updatePhases(competitionFilter);
                } else {
                    contentLoader.innerHTML = '<p>No hay torneos para esta temporada.</p>';
                    wrapper.querySelector('.phase-filter').innerHTML = '<option>— Fase —</option>';
                    wrapper.querySelector('.matchday-filter').innerHTML = '<option>— Jornada —</option>';
                }
            }

            async function updatePhases(competitionSelect, preselectPhaseId = null, preselectMatchday = 0) {
                const wrapper = competitionSelect.closest('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                const phaseFilter = wrapper.querySelector('.phase-filter');
                phaseFilter.innerHTML = '<option>Cargando...</option>';
                phaseFilter.disabled = true;

                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('action', 'get_phases_for_competition');
                formData.append('nonce', nonce);
                formData.append('competition_id', competitionSelect.value);

                const response = await fetch(ajax_url, { method: 'POST', body: formData });
                const data = await response.json();

                phaseFilter.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Fase —</option>';
                if (data.success && data.data.length > 0) {
                    data.data.forEach(phase => {
                        phaseFilter.innerHTML += `<option value="${phase.id}" data-matchdays="${phase.matchdays}">${phase.name}</option>`;
                    });
                    phaseFilter.disabled = false;
                    phaseFilter.value = preselectPhaseId ? preselectPhaseId : data.data[0].id;
                    updateMatchdays(phaseFilter, preselectMatchday);
                    updateContent(wrapper);
                }
            }

            function updateMatchdays(phaseSelect, preselectMatchday = 0) {
                const wrapper = phaseSelect.closest('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                const matchdayFilter = wrapper.querySelector('.matchday-filter');
                const selectedOption = phaseSelect.options[phaseSelect.selectedIndex];
                const totalMatchdays = parseInt(selectedOption?.dataset.matchdays || 0);

                matchdayFilter.innerHTML = '<option value="0">— Todas —</option>';
                if (totalMatchdays > 0) {
                    for (let i = 1; i <= totalMatchdays; i++) { matchdayFilter.innerHTML += `<option value="${i}">Jornada ${i}</option>`; }
                    matchdayFilter.disabled = false;
                } else {
                    matchdayFilter.disabled = true;
                    matchdayFilter.value = '0';
                }
                if (preselectMatchday > 0 && totalMatchdays > 0) matchdayFilter.value = preselectMatchday;
            }

            async function updateContent(wrapper) {
                const contentLoader = wrapper.querySelector('.content-loader-container');
                const activeTab = wrapper.querySelector('.dimayor-inner-tab-link.active').dataset.type;
                const competitionId = wrapper.querySelector('.competition-filter').value;
                const phaseId = wrapper.querySelector('.phase-filter').value;
                const matchday = wrapper.querySelector('.matchday-filter').value;

                contentLoader.innerHTML = '<p>Cargando...</p>';
                if (!competitionId) { contentLoader.innerHTML = '<p>Por favor, seleccione un torneo.</p>'; return; }

                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('action', 'get_dynamic_content_v5');
                formData.append('nonce', nonce);
                formData.append('type', activeTab);
                formData.append('competition_id', competitionId);
                formData.append('competition_type', wrapper.dataset.competitionTypeName);
                formData.append('phase_id', phaseId);
                formData.append('matchday', matchday);
                formData.append('is_live', wrapper.closest('.dimayor-plugin-wrapper').dataset.isLive || '0');

                const response = await fetch(ajax_url, { method: 'POST', body: formData });
                const data = await response.json();
                contentLoader.innerHTML = data.success ? data.data.html : '<p>Error al cargar el contenido.</p>';
            }

            // Polling para actualizaciones en vivo (cada 60 segundos)
            setInterval(function() {
                document.querySelectorAll('.dimayor-main-tab-content.active .dimayor-inner-wrapper').forEach(wrapper => {
                    // Refrescar solo si hay una competición y fase seleccionada
                    const competitionId = wrapper.querySelector('.competition-filter').value;
                    const phaseId = wrapper.querySelector('.phase-filter').value;
                    if (competitionId && phaseId) {
                        updateContent(wrapper);
                    }
                });
            }, 60000);

            // Inicialización al cargar el DOM
            document.querySelectorAll('.dimayor-main-tab-content.active .dimayor-inner-wrapper').forEach(w => runSmartLoad(w));
        })();
    </script>

            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .dimayor-modal header h3 {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 800;
        }

        .dimayor-modal .modal-close {
            margin-left: auto;
            border: none;
            background: transparent;
            font-size: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: #fff;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }

        .dimayor-modal .modal-body {
            padding: 14px 16px 18px;
        }

        .dimayor-tabs {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 10px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
        }

        .dimayor-tab {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 14px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all .2s ease;
        }

        .dimayor-tab.is-active {
            border-color: #e9ecef;
            background: #f8f9fa;
            border-radius: 8px;
            color: var(--dimayor-accent, #000);
        }

        .dimayor-tabs__panels {
            margin-top: 16px;
            min-height: 200px;
        }

        .dimayor-tabpanel {
            display: none;
        }

        .dimayor-tabpanel.is-active {
            display: block;
        }

        /* --- ESTILOS DEFINITIVOS PARA TIMELINE CON CSS GRID --- */
        .dim-timeline-grid {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 15px;
            padding: 20px 0;
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .timeline-grid-event {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
            /* Columna Izquierda | Marcador | Columna Derecha */
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }

        .event-timeline-marker {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            width: 50px;
            /* Ancho de la línea de tiempo central */
        }

        .event-timeline-marker::before {
            /* La línea vertical de la timeline */
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 3px;
            background-color: #e9ecef;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .event-icon {
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 50%;
            z-index: 2;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border: 2px solid #eee;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        }

        .event-icon svg {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            display: block;
        }

        .event-minute {
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #6c757d;
            z-index: 2;
            background: #fff;
            padding: 0 5px;
        }

        .event-content--home {
            text-align: right;
        }

        .event-content--away {
            text-align: left;
        }

        .event-body {
            padding: 10px 15px;
            background-color: #f8f9fa;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid #e9ecef;
        }

        .event-title {
            font-weight: 800;
            font-size: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 2px;
        }

        .event-desc {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #333;
            line-height: 1.4;
        }

        /* Colores de eventos */
        .event-type-goal .event-icon {
            border-color: #4caf50;
        }

        .event-type-yellow .event-icon,
        .event-type-second_yellow .event-icon {
            border-color: #ffc107;
        }

        .event-type-red .event-icon {
            border-color: #f44336;
        }

        .event-type-substitution .event-icon {
            border-color: #2196f3;
        }

        /* --- NUEVOS ESTILOS PARA LA PESTAÑA DE NÓMINAS --- */
        .lineups-container {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 30px;
            align-items: flex-start;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .lineup-column {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 0;
        }

        .lineup-column h4 {
            margin-top: 0;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-size: 18px;
            color: var(--dimayor-accent, #023171);
        }

        .lineup-section {
            margin-bottom: 25px;
        }

        .lineup-section h5 {
            margin-top: 0;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 16px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
            padding-bottom: 5px;
        }

        .lineup-table {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .lineup-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 30px 1fr auto;
            /* Número | Nombre | Eventos */
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 8px 6px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f3f5;
        }

        .lineup-shirt-number {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #6c757d;
            text-align: right;
        }

        .lineup-player-name {
            font-weight: 500;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
        }

        .lineup-player-events {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .lineup-event-icon {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 14px;
            height: 16px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }

        .lineup-event-icon.yellow-card,
        .lineup-event-icon.red-card {
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        .lineup-event-icon.sub-off,
        .lineup-event-icon.sub-on {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
            background-color: transparent;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 14px;
            line-height: 1;
        }

        /* Verde para entrar */

        .coach-section {
            margin-top: 20px;
            padding-top: 15px;
            border-top: 1px dashed #ced4da;
        }

        .coach-section h6 {
            margin: 0 0 5px;
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #6c757d;
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        .coach-section p {
            margin: 0;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        /* === Mejora responsive tabla de posiciones (Opción B) === */
        @media (min-width:520px) and (max-width:900px) {
            .dmr-standings {
                overflow-x: auto;
                -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            }

            .dmr-standings table {
                min-width: 720px;
            }

            .dmr-standings th:first-child,
            .dmr-standings td:first-child {
                position: sticky;
                left: 0;
                background: #fff;
                z-index: 2;
            }

            .dmr-standings thead th {
                position: sticky;
                top: 0;
                z-index: 3;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width:519px) {
            .dmr-standings {
                overflow-x: auto;
                -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            }

            .dmr-standings table {
                min-width: 600px;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width:900px) {

            .dmr-standings thead th,
            .dmr-standings tbody td {
                padding: 10px 12px;
            }
        }

        .match-postponed-label {
            font-size: 14px;
            /* Tamaño de fuente más pequeño */
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #e65100;
            /* Un color naranja para indicar estado especial */
            background-color: #fff7f0;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #ffcc99;
        }

        /* --- INICIO DE NUEVOS ESTILOS PARA TABLAS RESPONSIVAS --- */
        .dmr-table-wrapper {
            overflow-x: auto;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            /* Scroll suave en iOS */
        }

        .dmr-table-wrapper .dimayor-table {
            border-spacing: 0;
            /* Necesario para que 'sticky' funcione bien */
        }

        .dmr-table-wrapper thead th {
            position: -webkit-sticky;
            /* Para compatibilidad con Safari */
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 2;
            /* Por encima de las celdas de la primera columna */
        }

        .dmr-table-wrapper tbody th,
        .dmr-table-wrapper tbody td:first-child {
            position: -webkit-sticky;
            position: sticky;
            left: 0;
            background: #fff;
            /* Fondo para ocultar el contenido que pasa por detrás */
            z-index: 1;
        }

        /* Estilo para la celda de la esquina superior izquierda */
        .dmr-table-wrapper thead th:first-child {
            z-index: 3;
        }

        /* Opcional: añadir una pequeña sombra para indicar que hay más contenido */
        .dmr-table-wrapper tbody td:first-child,
        .dmr-table-wrapper thead th:first-child {
            border-right: 1px solid #dee2e6;
        }

        /* --- FIN DE NUEVOS ESTILOS --- */

        /* === Fin mejora responsive === */
    </style>

    <script>
        (function () {
            // Solo registrar el código base una vez
            if (window.dimayorWidgetInitialized) {
                // Si ya está inicializado, solo ejecutamos la carga inteligente para los nuevos wrappers
                if (typeof runSmartLoad === 'function') {
                    document.querySelectorAll('.dimayor-main-tab-content.active .dimayor-inner-wrapper').forEach(w => runSmartLoad(w));
                }
                return;
            }
            window.dimayorWidgetInitialized = true;

            const ajax_url = "https://dimayor.com.co/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php";
            const nonce = "c2622c1a04";

            // Delegación de eventos para clics
            document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                const tabLink = e.target.closest('.dimayor-main-tab-link');
                if (tabLink) {
                    switchMainTab(tabLink);
                    return;
                }

                const innerTabLink = e.target.closest('.dimayor-inner-tab-link');
                if (innerTabLink) {
                    const wrapper = innerTabLink.closest('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                    if (innerTabLink.classList.contains('active')) return;
                    wrapper.querySelectorAll('.dimayor-inner-tab-link').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
                    innerTabLink.classList.add('active');
                    updateContent(wrapper);
                    return;
                }

                const filterToggle = e.target.closest('.filters-toggle-button');
                if (filterToggle) {
                    const nav = filterToggle.closest('.dimayor-inner-nav');
                    if (nav) nav.classList.toggle('filters-open');
                    return;
                }
            });

            // Delegación de eventos para cambios en filtros
            document.addEventListener('change', function (e) {
                const wrapper = e.target.closest('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                if (!wrapper) return;

                if (e.target.classList.contains('season-filter')) {
                    updateCompetitions(e.target);
                } else if (e.target.classList.contains('competition-filter')) {
                    updatePhases(e.target);
                } else if (e.target.classList.contains('phase-filter')) {
                    updateMatchdays(e.target);
                    updateContent(wrapper);
                } else if (e.target.classList.contains('matchday-filter')) {
                    updateContent(wrapper);
                }
            });

            window.runSmartLoad = async function (wrapper) {
                if (!wrapper || wrapper.dataset.initialized) return;
                wrapper.dataset.initialized = 'true';

                const seasonFilter = wrapper.querySelector('.season-filter');
                const competitionFilter = wrapper.querySelector('.competition-filter');
                const contentLoader = wrapper.querySelector('.content-loader-container');

                contentLoader.innerHTML = '<p>Detectando competición activa...</p>';

                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('action', 'get_active_filters');
                formData.append('nonce', nonce);
                formData.append('season_id', seasonFilter.value);
                formData.append('competition_type', wrapper.dataset.competitionTypeName);

                try {
                    const response = await fetch(ajax_url, { method: 'POST', body: formData });
                    const smartData = await response.json();

                    if (smartData.success) {
                        const { competition_id, phase_id, matchday } = smartData.data;
                        await updateCompetitions(seasonFilter, competition_id);
                        await updatePhases(competitionFilter, phase_id, matchday);
                    } else {
                        updateCompetitions(seasonFilter);
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error("Error durante la carga inteligente:", error);
                    updateCompetitions(seasonFilter);
                }
            };

            function switchMainTab(tab) {
                if (tab.classList.contains('active')) return;
                const container = tab.closest('.dimayor-plugin-wrapper');
                container.querySelectorAll('.dimayor-main-tab-link, .dimayor-main-tab-content').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
                tab.classList.add('active');

                const color = tab.dataset.color || '#023171';
                document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--dimayor-accent', color);

                const content = container.querySelector(`.dimayor-main-tab-content[data-content-type="${tab.dataset.tabType}"]`);
                if (content) {
                    content.classList.add('active');
                    const wrapper = content.querySelector('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                    runSmartLoad(wrapper);
                }
            }

            async function updateCompetitions(seasonSelect, preselectCompetitionId = null) {
                const wrapper = seasonSelect.closest('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                const competitionFilter = wrapper.querySelector('.competition-filter');
                const contentLoader = wrapper.querySelector('.content-loader-container');

                competitionFilter.innerHTML = '<option>Cargando...</option>';
                competitionFilter.disabled = true;
                if (!preselectCompetitionId) contentLoader.innerHTML = '<p>Cargando competiciones...</p>';

                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('action', 'get_competitions_for_season_ajax_v5');
                formData.append('nonce', nonce);
                formData.append('season_id', seasonSelect.value);
                formData.append('competition_type', wrapper.dataset.competitionTypeName);

                const response = await fetch(ajax_url, { method: 'POST', body: formData });
                const data = await response.json();

                competitionFilter.innerHTML = '';
                if (data.success && data.data.length > 0) {
                    data.data.forEach(comp => {
                        competitionFilter.innerHTML += `<option value="${comp.id}">${comp.name}</option>`;
                    });
                    competitionFilter.disabled = false;
                    competitionFilter.style.display = data.data.length > 1 ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                    if (preselectCompetitionId) competitionFilter.value = preselectCompetitionId;
                    if (!preselectCompetitionId) await updatePhases(competitionFilter);
                } else {
                    contentLoader.innerHTML = '<p>No hay torneos para esta temporada.</p>';
                    wrapper.querySelector('.phase-filter').innerHTML = '<option>— Fase —</option>';
                    wrapper.querySelector('.matchday-filter').innerHTML = '<option>— Jornada —</option>';
                }
            }

            async function updatePhases(competitionSelect, preselectPhaseId = null, preselectMatchday = 0) {
                const wrapper = competitionSelect.closest('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                const phaseFilter = wrapper.querySelector('.phase-filter');
                phaseFilter.innerHTML = '<option>Cargando...</option>';
                phaseFilter.disabled = true;

                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('action', 'get_phases_for_competition');
                formData.append('nonce', nonce);
                formData.append('competition_id', competitionSelect.value);

                const response = await fetch(ajax_url, { method: 'POST', body: formData });
                const data = await response.json();

                phaseFilter.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Fase —</option>';
                if (data.success && data.data.length > 0) {
                    data.data.forEach(phase => {
                        phaseFilter.innerHTML += `<option value="${phase.id}" data-matchdays="${phase.matchdays}">${phase.name}</option>`;
                    });
                    phaseFilter.disabled = false;
                    phaseFilter.value = preselectPhaseId ? preselectPhaseId : data.data[0].id;
                    updateMatchdays(phaseFilter, preselectMatchday);
                    updateContent(wrapper);
                }
            }

            function updateMatchdays(phaseSelect, preselectMatchday = 0) {
                const wrapper = phaseSelect.closest('.dimayor-inner-wrapper');
                const matchdayFilter = wrapper.querySelector('.matchday-filter');
                const selectedOption = phaseSelect.options[phaseSelect.selectedIndex];
                const totalMatchdays = parseInt(selectedOption?.dataset.matchdays || 0);

                matchdayFilter.innerHTML = '<option value="0">— Todas —</option>';
                if (totalMatchdays > 0) {
                    for (let i = 1; i <= totalMatchdays; i++) { matchdayFilter.innerHTML += `<option value="${i}">Jornada ${i}</option>`; }
                    matchdayFilter.disabled = false;
                } else {
                    matchdayFilter.disabled = true;
                    matchdayFilter.value = '0';
                }
                if (preselectMatchday > 0 && totalMatchdays > 0) matchdayFilter.value = preselectMatchday;
            }

            async function updateContent(wrapper) {
                const contentLoader = wrapper.querySelector('.content-loader-container');
                const activeTab = wrapper.querySelector('.dimayor-inner-tab-link.active').dataset.type;
                const competitionId = wrapper.querySelector('.competition-filter').value;
                const phaseId = wrapper.querySelector('.phase-filter').value;
                const matchday = wrapper.querySelector('.matchday-filter').value;

                contentLoader.innerHTML = '<p>Cargando...</p>';
                if (!competitionId) { contentLoader.innerHTML = '<p>Por favor, seleccione un torneo.</p>'; return; }

                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('action', 'get_dynamic_content_v5');
                formData.append('nonce', nonce);
                formData.append('type', activeTab);
                formData.append('competition_id', competitionId);
                formData.append('competition_type', wrapper.dataset.competitionTypeName);
                formData.append('phase_id', phaseId);
                formData.append('matchday', matchday);
                formData.append('is_live', wrapper.closest('.dimayor-plugin-wrapper').dataset.isLive || '0');

                const response = await fetch(ajax_url, { method: 'POST', body: formData });
                const data = await response.json();
                contentLoader.innerHTML = data.success ? data.data.html : '<p>Error al cargar el contenido.</p>';
            }

            // Polling para actualizaciones en vivo (cada 60 segundos)
            setInterval(function() {
                document.querySelectorAll('.dimayor-main-tab-content.active .dimayor-inner-wrapper').forEach(wrapper => {
                    // Refrescar solo si hay una competición y fase seleccionada
                    const competitionId = wrapper.querySelector('.competition-filter').value;
                    const phaseId = wrapper.querySelector('.phase-filter').value;
                    if (competitionId && phaseId) {
                        updateContent(wrapper);
                    }
                });
            }, 60000);

            // Inicialización al cargar el DOM
            document.querySelectorAll('.dimayor-main-tab-content.active .dimayor-inner-wrapper').forEach(w => runSmartLoad(w));
        })();
    </script>
